case_title: NORTHEAST COMMUNITY FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS DOAN, LOAN MY

docket_entries.description: REQ.OF PLTFF.TO RESET CASE. SENT OUT INFO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,920.58 FILED BY NORTHEAST COMMUNITY FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT DOAN, LOAN MY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHEAST COMMUNITY FEDERAL CREDIT UNION HEARING SET FOR FEB-20-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHEAST COMMUNITY FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOAN, LOAN MY $1,920.58 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,950.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHEAST COMMUNITY FEDERAL CREDIT UNION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DOAN, LOAN MY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-20-1997, GRANTED
